# Marketing UI kit — Cerios homepage

Mobile-first recreation of the cerios.com/nl homepage, built from the design-system components.

**Screens / bands**
- Sticky `NavBar` (wordmark + hamburger with green status dot)
- Dark photographic **hero** — display headline, lead, green + cream CTAs
- Light **content band** — "Softwarekwaliteit die werkt", editorial photo, navy + cream CTAs
- Dark **Academy band** with green glow — eyebrow, headline, three feature `Card`s
- Green **CTA band**
- Dark **footer** with link columns
- Full-screen navy **menu overlay** driven by `Accordion` (opens from the hamburger)

Open `index.html` — the hamburger opens the working menu overlay.

Composed entirely from: `Button`, `Card`, `Badge`, `NavBar`, `Accordion`, `Wordmark`. Photography is Unsplash placeholder — swap for real Cerios imagery.
